### Post by saharanvikas888 on 2012-12-14
I am using UBUNTU 12.04 (64 bit) and CUPS 1.6.1. I want to print test page on EPSON based Dot Matrix printer.

But it gives en error: 

[SIZE=3]Cups Server Error:   'client-error-document-format-not-supported'[/SIZE]

I restarted the cups service before printing the test page.
Welcome in case of any suggestion.


[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/png;base64,[/IMG]
